title: pavonia calyculosa
intro: Pavonia calyculosa, also known as the coral mallow, is a flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its vibrant pink to red flowers and hairy stems. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pavonia calyculosa include reducing inflammation, soothing skin conditions, and supporting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, teas, and salves, which can be applied topically to skin irritations or taken internally to promote overall well-being.
